name: pixel-toy-designer
description: 拼豆像素画设计工具第一阶段桌面端原型

scripts.check: node --check src/app.js && node --check server.js && node --check electron/main.js && node --check scripts/build-default-data.js && node --check scripts/check-mobile-app.js && node --check scripts/check-mobile-defaults.js && python3 -c "compile(open('server.py', encoding='utf-8').read(), 'server.py', 'exec')" && python3 -c "compile(open('scripts/parse-pattern-sheet.py', encoding='utf-8').read(), 'scripts/parse-pattern-sheet.py', 'exec')" && node scripts/check-zsh-syntax.js && node scripts/check-dom-bindings.js && node scripts/check-launchers.js && node scripts/check-default-data.js && node scripts/check-core-data.js && node scripts/check-ui-interactions.js && node scripts/check-server-api.js && python3 scripts/check-python-server.py && node scripts/check-ai-pipeline.js && node scripts/check-workflow.js && node scripts/check-assembly-workflow.js && node scripts/check-mobile-app.js && node scripts/check-mobile-defaults.js
